name: Mrs. Field's Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and both sugars together until smooth.
2. Add the egg and vanilla, mixing well.
3. In a separate bowl, blend 1 1/4 cups oatmeal until it becomes a fine powder. Set aside.
4. Grate the Hershey bar and set aside.
5. Combine the oatmeal mixture, flour, salt, baking powder, and baking soda in a separate bowl.
6. Gradually add this dry mixture to the butter/sugar mixture, stirring until well combined.
7. Add the chocolate chips and grated Hershey bar, mixing until evenly distributed.
8. Shape the dough into golf ball-sized cookies.
9. Bake on an ungreased cookie sheet at 375°F for 6 minutes.
